GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN.description: Grafana service account token with Viewer or Editor role
GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN.setup: Create at Grafana > Administration > Service Accounts

PROMETHEUS_NONPROD_URL.description: Non-production Prometheus URL. For AWS AMP, use local SigV4 proxy.
PROMETHEUS_NONPROD_URL.setup: See README for AWS AMP SigV4 proxy setup

PROMETHEUS_PROD_URL.description: Production Prometheus URL. For AWS AMP, use local SigV4 proxy.
PROMETHEUS_PROD_URL.setup: See README for AWS AMP SigV4 proxy setup
